---
title: "Fantasy Maps"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Placeholder** — Add your map images to `assets/maps/` and replace the commented
template below with your maps and captions.
:::

<!--
Example layout for large captioned maps — uncomment and populate when images are ready.
Repeat the .map-entry block for each map.

::: {.map-entry}
![](../../assets/maps/map01.jpg){fig-align="center" width=100%}

*Name of the world / region — a sentence or two describing the setting, campaign, or
creative context for this map.*
:::

::: {.map-entry}
![](../../assets/maps/map02.jpg){fig-align="center" width=100%}

*Caption for second map.*
:::
-->
